'''Noa-Jek Darillian''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waring days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Noa-Jek Darillian a [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was educated in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] final decades. Ascending to the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] during his time with the Order, he dutifully reported to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] when the Republic's conflict with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] escalated into the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Taking up the mantle of [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]], Master Darillian served with distinction during the war.<ref name="SEI70" />
